title: PALEO AGES 2
description: the sequel of my mod paleo ages, who got his code and models lost, just a mod for fun and pratice
body:
this mod will bring prehistoric creatures, items and blocks

the current creatures in the mod are:

*tyrannosaurus (spawns on old taigas)

future creatures

*allosaurus
*utahraptor
*triceratops
*anzu
*stegourus
